control.description-key: Live tiles published from M365 Copilot onto a Power Apps dashboard.

property.name: serverBaseUrl
property.description-key: MCP/web server base URL, e.g. https://xxxx-3101.euw.devtunnels.ms

property.name: dashboardKey
property.description-key: Registry capability token (k for /dashboard and DELETE /tiles).

property.name: agentId
property.description-key: gptId of the M365 Copilot declarative agent to seed New report prompts into.

property.name: seedPrompt
property.description-key: Starter prompt placed (unsubmitted) into the Copilot input by New report.

property.name: autoRefreshSeconds
property.description-key: Poll /dashboard every N seconds. 0 or blank = off (nudge + manual Refresh only).

data-set.name: dashboardGrid
data-set.description-key: Dataset anchor used to host the control full-page. Records are ignored.
